text.tspan: My creative ideas become code for research that serve the real world —
where an experiment stops being a temporary run and becomes part of a stable, traceable system.
I build machine learning research systems in the spirit of
auditable, and extensible by design. My work lives in the deep amethyst space between
human intention and digital execution, where glowing lines of automation turn uncertainty into structure.
My work is grounded in synthesis:
, programming stability with human empathy, structure with
intuition, and precision with reflection for the
